message:
Merge PR #2900: fix: disable dolt_transaction_commit to prevent read-only commit storm (#2685)

bd already does explicit COMMIT on writes, making this setting
unnecessary. With it enabled, multi-agent workloads generated 100k+
empty commits and 700k+ connections that crashed Dolt.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2900
Author: DreadPirateRobertz

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1220,7 +1220,7 @@ listener:
 data_dir: "%s"
 
 behavior:
-  dolt_transaction_commit: true
+  dolt_transaction_commit: false
   auto_gc_behavior:
     enable: true
     archive_level: 1
